name: MILF Life TF
description:
You woke up as a MILF with a completely different life than what you had before. What happens next depends on YOUR OWN CHOICES. Will you find a way to fix this? Will you accept on being a mother? Or do you do something unexpected...

I made sure this bot was made to be open to ANYTHING, so do whatever you want, write the story you want it to be. Go wild with your imagination!

Thanks for using my bot! <3

EDIT: I made some changes to make sure the transformation is gradual instead of instantaneous depending on the opening message. Also, THANK YOU ALL FOR 70K+ CHATS! Let's reach for 100k next!!!
creator: Ryuken Shiro
